chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.16 of 2022 Mst. Maryam Sultana and another Versus Mr. Ch. Raheel Rauf and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing (priority) case 1. For order on office objection/reply at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.77/2022 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 19.03.2024 None present for appellant. Mr. Fazal-ur-Rehman, Advocate for Respondents No.1 & 2. Mr. Allah Warayo Khan, Advocate for Respondent No.7..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Appellant’s counsel is not regular and punctual in appearance since last several dates. On 08.04.2022 he was reported to be unwell followed by his absence on 10.05.2022 when his brief was held. He was then called absent on 27.10.2022, 08.12.2022 and so also today; there is no intimation either. The appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
